title: Write migration guide for importing other task systems
description: Document how humans and LLM agents should migrate tasks/issues/comments from other task management systems into Waystation's JSON ledger. Include mapping guidance, validation flow, review strategy, and examples for common source systems.
acceptance: A docs/migration-guide.md file explains the migration workflow end to end.
The guide covers concept mapping for tasks, issues, comments/messages, assignees/claims, statuses, labels, priorities, dependencies, and scopes.
The guide includes a review checklist and commands to reindex, validate, regenerate reports, and inspect samples.
README links to the migration guide.
waystation validate is clean after adding the guide task and docs.
notes: This is a documentation guide, not an importer implementation. Keep it useful for both humans and LLM agents.
